name: aviation_security_reconciliation_job_marrowbridge_lib_eq

agents.name: Arjun Chen

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.

forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Arjun Chen must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Arjun Chen do?
